commands.name: import
commands.description:
Imports data from the F1 Live Timing API, if you have missed recording a session live.
The data is imported in a format that can be replayed in real-time using openf1-console.

options.name: --meeting-key
options.description: The Meeting Key of the session to import. If not provided, all meetings in the year will be listed.

options.name: --session-key
options.description: The Session Key of the session inside the selected meeting to import. If not provided, all sessions in the provided meeting will be listed.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Whether verbose logging should be enabled [default: False]

options.name: --with-api
options.description: Whether the API endpoint should be exposed at http://localhost:61937 [default: False]

options.name: --data-directory
options.description: The directory to which timing data will be read from and written to

options.name: --notify
options.description: Whether audible BELs are sent to your terminal when new race control messages are received

arguments.name: year
arguments.description: The year the meeting took place.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Whether verbose logging should be enabled [default: False]

options.name: --with-api
options.description: Whether the API endpoint should be exposed at http://localhost:61937 [default: False]

options.name: --data-directory
options.description: The directory to which timing data will be read from and written to

options.name: --notify
options.description: Whether audible BELs are sent to your terminal when new race control messages are received
